note: Persistent creative memory for the HERMES Hit Factory — the semantic-memory tier of the brain. The algorithm always reads this so preferences and exclusions stick without re-specifying. Edit freely; it's version-controlled.

notes: no bedroom scenes or mirrors-on-the-wall clichés
avoid 'skyline' and 'throne' — overused AI-lyric clichés (2026-07-01, from generating "Second Wind")
avoid the fixed phrase 'no turning back' — generic AI-lyric opener
fire/flame/crown were already in the generic avoid-list (bannedWords.ts) but weren't being enforced during generation until this same pass — see lib/hermes/providers/mockLyricsProvider.ts

preferences.vocals: gritty raw male rap, no autotune
preferences.hooks: melodic, chantable, with a dark turn and a title callback
notes: keep an emotional core underneath the aggression
